title: panicum formosanum var. hirsutum
intro: Panicum formosanum var. hirsutum, also known as Hairy Wild Rice, is a type of grass native to Taiwan, belonging to the Poaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against oxidative stress. In traditional herbal medicine, Panicum formosanum var. hirsutum is prepared as a decoction or infusion, often used to treat respiratory problems and other ailments.
